# GitHub Emoji

Wow, :+1: I like this! :tada: :sparkles:

`:shipit:` and other custom GitHub emoji are not yet supported and will render as :shipit:
[Track this issue](https://github.com/rossmacarthur/emojis/issues/32) for updates.

[Source reference](https://docs.github.com/en/get-started/writing-on-github/getting-started-with-writing-and-formatting-on-github/basic-writing-and-formatting-syntax#using-emojis)
